small can into the room. He pointed t0 his eyes ad then traced three lines across the floor-_he had detected three aser trip beams and was silently warning us of their location_ We picked our way Qver them with care_ and then had t0 wait again Jaime opened the next door. The acrid scents of old grease and recent hot-metal work assailed uS, but other than few detached 'Mech arms and separated cockpit system, that was all we found The workshop did not hold the OmniMech and the numbers were on the wrong side of our predicted halfway point . Stephen glared at Jaime and me as if were our tault; then spun on his heel and went back through the office. He didn' wait for us and we had to guess at two 0f the laser trips We caught up to him at one of the Mech bay' rear utility doors. Again he was halfway through the security system , delib erating over wire choices_ More certain of herself now; Jaime stepped right in and easily picked out the proper combinations that had t0 be cut and spliced_ The lock droned its sharp buzz , and Stephen shouldered his way through without waiting: Light spilled onto the ground from within and voices rose in question followed on heels turning immediately left to cover his back: Luckily for Stephen ran into guard who'd been using water cooler crowded behind the door we'd entered jabbed the barrel of my Intek rifle right into his chest over the heart; arrest- ing his move for the pistol riding beneath his left arm_ Two other Buards sat  under the sights of   Stephen' $ submachine gun; seated at table between set of stairs and another door; Tranq them; said, prodding this one hands into the air and then spinning him to face the wall: The first whispering cough sounded loud in the confines of the room; and risked glance back, thinking he had shot them with the silenced SMG_ He hadn"t, though it remained pressed into the side of one man' neck while he waited for the other t0 succumb to the tranquilizer. He dealt with the second similarly and then walked over t0 stick dart into the neck of my captive_ Jaime was standing near the door, hand hovering over the locking mechanism; ~It's keyed from this side, she said, her voice questioning was bit strange for the guards to have locked the inner door against entry t0 their station_ Stephen   shrugged and stepped toward the stairs_ "m heading up. We should stay together; suggested pointedly: Our time was short: The veteran'$ gaze was cold: "m heading up, he said again, nestling small device into one ear. thin wire extend- ed out ad toward his mouth: Keep in touch by commlinks wakarimasu-ka?' had wondered about possible Asian origins before now; had my answer: knew enough of the common phrases for Drac Japanese_ answered understand: Wakarimasu: thought it an extra hazard  splitting our forces_ but now was not the time t0 argue. He took the stairs three at time as lithe and light as cat: watched him past the first bend_ then moved to join Jaime
at the door. She was step ahead of me already deactivating the lock and pushing the door inward. hand shot out of the dark beyond and caught her by the wrist, pulling her in and around to block the door and my shot: crude knife , nothing better really than piece of sharpened spring steel, pressed at her neck and stifled any scream she might have made You ve gotno chance , said quickly; forestalling any ethal move he might make: My laser rifle never wavered_ He hid himself well behind Jaime_ but not 50 well that couldn" center shot right above his right eye_ Drop the blade and you live_ Until you go cutting into my brain, he said with no Iittle sarcasm: But then his head peeked around further and frowned was looking at the three unconscious guards ad comparing their uniforms to my dark gray fatigues "You 're not Skye Tiger. His confusion and complete lack of concern for our pres ence stayed my finger for aother few precious heartbeats_ also had the feeling I'd seen his face before_ 'Very good; agreed And your friends aren' dead, just out. 'They' re my jailers; not  my friends_ Then, realizing his position, the man took his knife away from Jaime' throat and pushed her away: Commendable_ except then he nearly bought himself third eye when he stepped forward quickly in my direc tion_ was riding the trigger on my laser rifle tightly ad nearly burned him down: 'You"Il take me with you, he said touch of reliet coloring his strong voice The man had the moves of a soldier and acted as if he held the superior position when in reality he was finger-spasm away from oblivion knew the attitude not the tace MechWarrior? " asked. He nodded_ Erik Gray;" he introduced himself; The Gray Ghost. Now placed his features from the fight had bet on few months back: He'd managed an impressive showing against Kelley Metz of Tancred Stables recall_ lost and did too. Two hundred marks Now was not the time t0 recover lost wager; though shook my head, warning Jaime off. The tech had drawn her Nakjama laser pisto and reversed it for club prepared t0 drop Gray with the others Check the other door; said nodding back into the room that had served the MechWarrior' prison_ Does that lead t0 the bay? He nodded_ warily watch- ing the end the Intek barrel, which had not wavered_ Guards" None he answered promptly: But there will be at least one technician duty the controller' = room above. looked up at the ceiling: Verflu 'chenl With the sudden turn of events_ had not put in my commlink: managed to one-hand the rifle while fishing from pocket and inserting into my ear. twisted the wire until it rested at the corner of my mouth: Stephen there is tech on duty in tne room above uS_ Not anymore Stephen voice whispered back.
